title: GraphQL query for all data in account
excerpt: What would be the GraphQL syntax to retrieve all data in my account - boards, IDs, items, subitems, anything else in the account?

posts.author: rkaplan (Richard Kaplan)
posts.cookedHtml: What would be the GraphQL syntax to retrieve all data in my account - boards, IDs, items, subitems, anything else in the account?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @rkaplan !

I don’t believe you will be able to build a working query that gets ALL of the information inside your account at once.

You can check our API documentation to see how to retrieve the data in multiple requests

Cheers,
Matias
